nredisstack_sync.signature: SortedSetLengthByValue(RedisKey key, RedisValue min, RedisValue max, Exclude exclude = Exclude.None, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the sorted set.

params.name: min
params.description: The min value to filter by.

params.name: max
params.description: The max value to filter by.

params.name: exclude
params.description: Whether to exclude min and max from the range check (defaults to both inclusive).

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The number of elements in the specified score range.
